description_long: This kiosk features a pentagonal structure elevated on a single central pole with a circular base for stability. Each of its five vertical panels displays a different artwork, including the Mona Lisa and other modern and classical images, framed by blue trim. The kiosk's roof is flat and pentagonal, with two small, round fixtures and a central fin-like element on top, adding a decorative touch. The main body appears to be constructed from metal, with smooth, painted surfaces and printed or laminated art panels. The base is open and ring-shaped, likely to allow for easy cleaning or anchoring to the ground. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments as an information or art display kiosk.
description: A pentagonal, metal kiosk with art panels, blue trim, and a flat decorative roof, elevated on a central pole with a circular base. Each side features different artwork, making it visually striking and modern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Mona Lisa artwork prominently displayed on the central panel, with blue trim and the pentagonal roof visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a modern, stylized female figure on the left panel and a classical painting on the adjacent panel, with the roof's round fixtures more visible.
description_view_2: The side panel features a classical painting and a modern portrait with yellow background, with the pentagonal roof and blue trim clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view displays a modern artwork of two figures in white and black, with the yellow-accented panel partially visible and the circular base structure prominent.
attribute_signage_type: Printed art panels on all five vertical sides, integrated into the structure; no visible text, only images.
attribute_roof_design: Flat pentagonal roof with blue trim, two round fixtures, and a central fin-like decorative element; appears to be made of metal or plastic.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with artistic and minimalist influences
